hero.eyebrow: Smart screen time & child safety platform
hero.subtitle: Kibal helps parents track, manage device usage, and protect children from unhealthy online content in a smart, supportive, and respectful way.

simulator.title: Interactive Screen Time Simulator
simulator.subtitle: Select your child's age and primary device to view recommended daily limits and simulated risk level.

tips.t2_5: Children under 5 should avoid screen time. Limit high-quality educational programs watched with parents to less than 1 hour daily.
tips.t6_12: Primary school children should be capped at 1.5 - 2 hours daily. Ensure screen time doesn't interfere with sleep or physical play.
tips.t13_18: Teens can spend up to 3 hours for learning and play. Encourage them to self-regulate and develop healthy digital habits.

features.title: Core Safety Features
features.subtitle: Designed to empower parents to guide children's digital habits without causing feelings of surveillance.
features.f1_desc: Get live visual reports of active apps and websites that consume your child's screen time.
features.f2_desc: Automatically lock entertainment apps when the daily limit runs out, keeping educational apps open.
features.f3_desc: State-of-the-art AI filters out 99.9% of adult, violent, and harmful content before it loads.
features.f4_desc: Locate your child on a real-time map and receive notifications when they enter or leave pre-defined safe zones.
features.how_it_works_subtitle: With 3 simple steps, you can start monitoring and supporting your child's digital habits.
features.step1_desc: Download Kibal Parent on your device and Kibal Kid on your child's device from the App Store or Google Play.
features.step2_desc: Link the two devices via a secure QR code and set daily screen limits appropriate for your child's age.
features.step3_desc: Receive daily AI-powered activity reports and tweak the app blocking configurations remotely at any time.
features.testimonials_title: Over 50,000 parents found peace of mind
features.testimonials_subtitle: Hear real stories from parents who successfully helped their children balance screen time and play with Kibal.
features.t1_quote: Before Kibal, my son spent 4 hours on his phone daily and threw tantrums when I took it away. Now, the phone locks automatically after 1.5 hours. He understands the limit and reads books instead without arguing.
features.t2_quote: I love Kibal's AI Web Filter. My oldest daughter started searching for sensitive things online, and Kibal instantly blocked it and notified me discreetly. A truly invaluable application.
features.t3_quote: Very easy to set up, and the GPS tracking is incredibly accurate. I feel so relieved knowing my child arrived at school safely without having to call and interrupt her.

pricing.title: Flexible Plans for Families
pricing.subtitle: Choose the perfect plan to secure and support your children's digital future.
pricing.free_desc: Essential monitoring tools for parents to get started.
pricing.pro_desc: Full set of smart AI filters and limit tools for 1-2 children.
pricing.family_desc: Ultimate family security pack supporting up to 5 devices and GPS tracking.
pricing.billing_faq_q1: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
pricing.billing_faq_a1: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time directly in your account settings. Your premium features will remain active until the end of your billing cycle.
pricing.billing_faq_a2: We offer a full 7-day money-back guarantee if you are not satisfied with the platform. Simply send a refund request email to our billing team.
pricing.billing_faq_a3: We accept bank transfers (dynamic QR), MoMo, ZaloPay, and major international credit cards like Visa and Mastercard.

about.title: The Kibal Mission
about.subtitle: Restoring technology as a healthy development tool, rather than a source of constant distraction and addiction.
about.story_p1: Kibal was founded by a team of software engineers and child psychologists. As parents ourselves, we felt overwhelmed seeing our children glued to screens and drifting away from family activities.
about.story_p2: We believe the solution is not total bans, but teaching children digital literacy and self-regulation. Kibal is designed to foster transparency, mutual trust, and safety between parents and kids.
about.timeline_subtitle: Important milestones marking Kibal's progress in supporting tens of thousands of families.
about.t1_event: Project founded from the creators' personal parenting challenges. Finalized the initial prototype.
about.t2_event: Officially launched on the App Store & Google Play, reaching 10,000 successful beta testers.
about.t3_event: Integrated next-generation AI web filtering and behavioral reports, trusted by 50,000 active families daily.
about.team_subtitle: Kibal brings together leading talent in software security, AI, and child behavioral psychology.
about.m1_bio: Over 20 years of research in digital behaviors and teen psychology across national academic institutes.
about.m2_bio: Former security engineer and cloud architect in Silicon Valley, expert in safe cloud AI systems.
about.m3_bio: UX specialist and former product manager at prominent EdTech platforms.

helps.title: Help & Support
helps.subtitle: Find immediate answers to frequently asked questions about installing and configuring Kibal.
helps.faq_q1: Does Kibal run in the background and drain my child's battery?
helps.faq_a1: Kibal is highly optimized to run silently in the background. Its average battery usage is just 1.5% to 2% per day, keeping performance smooth and battery life intact.
helps.faq_q2: Can my child bypass or uninstall Kibal from their device?
helps.faq_a2: No. Kibal is protected by our advanced Anti-Uninstall system. Safe removal requires the parent's secret security PIN, preventing children from disabling tracking.
helps.faq_a3: Kibal supports child device tracking on both iOS (iPhone/iPad) and Android. Parents can monitor via their own iOS/Android apps or directly on our web dashboard.
helps.faq_q4: Can I manage my child's limits remotely?
helps.faq_a4: Yes, entirely remote. All settings, instant locks, app limits, and GPS location updates sync in real-time via the cloud, giving you control from anywhere.
helps.faq_q5: Does Kibal filter harmful comments on YouTube?
helps.faq_a5: Yes. Kibal's smart filter automatically analyzes and hides profane, abusive, or bullying comments on YouTube when viewed on browsers or our integrated viewer.
helps.faq_q6: What if my child manually changes the device timezone or disables Wi-Fi?
helps.faq_a6: Kibal syncs time directly from our global servers, manual timezone changes won't affect limits. If offline, restricted apps remain locked locally until internet access resumes.
helps.faq_q7: Is my child's privacy secured from third parties?
helps.faq_a7: We employ top security standards and promise never to sell children's activity data. All data is encrypted and visible solely to verified parent accounts.
helps.faq_q8: How do I add a second child device to my account?
helps.faq_a8: In the Parent app, simply select 'Add Child Device' and scan the QR code displayed using the camera of the newly installed child device.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: We are fully committed to protecting your child's personal data and family information.
privacy.p1_desc: Kibal only gathers data necessary for parental controls, including active app names, durations, and GPS coordinates if enabled. We do NOT read private chats, access personal photos, or collect account passwords.
privacy.p2_desc: All communication between your child's device and Kibal servers is secured using End-to-End Encryption (E2EE) with the AES-256 standard. Only the parent account holds the key to view this data.
privacy.p3_desc: Your child's privacy is not for sale. Kibal guarantees never to share, rent, sell, or advertise using children's data to any third-party marketing services.
privacy.p4_desc: On our website, cookies are solely used to persist login sessions and save theme/language preferences. We do not use third-party tracking pixels or retargeting cookies.
privacy.p5_desc: You have full rights to request data export, modify details, or completely delete your account and all associated child telemetry history at any time.
privacy.p6_desc: Kibal fully complies with the Children's Online Privacy Protection Act (COPPA), GDPR principles, and local cybersecurity regulations in our markets.

footer.desc: Kibal - The leading screen time management and child safety platform. Empowering children to build healthy digital habits.
